allow: Bash(node -e "try { require\('pdfkit'\); console.log\('pdfkit OK'\) } catch\(e\) { console.log\('pdfkit MISSING:', e.message\) }")

Bash(node -e "const pool = require\('./db/connection'\); pool.query\('SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema=\\'public\\' AND table_name IN \(\\'clients\\',\\'factures\\'\)'\).then\(r => { console.log\('Tables:', r.rows.map\(r=>r.table_name\)\); pool.end\(\); }\).catch\(e => { console.log\('DB error:', e.message\); pool.end\(\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const pool = require\('./db/connection'\); pool.query\('SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema=\\'public\\' AND table_name IN \(\\'clients\\',\\'factures\\'\)'\).then\(r => { console.log\('Tables:', r.rows.map\(r=>r.table_name\)\); pool.end\(\); }\).catch\(e => { console.log\('DB error:', e.message\); pool.end\(\); }\)")
